name: lookup_ls_sonicstar_invalid_null_query
note: Expected divergence: vanilla 2.2.0 has no ls_sonicstar. Both rust-overlay and Ruth's TS reference reject a null query (the TS throws 'A valid query must be provided!'). This scenario confirms our worker returns InvalidQuery rather than crashing. Live parity via tests/sonicstar_live_parity.rs (step 10).
